facebook.caption:
Tourists buy fish sauce at the airport. Locals buy it here.

Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc is the real daily market of Phu Quoc town. Fresh seafood pulled off boats that morning. Local produce, spices, snacks, and street food stalls the resort crowd never finds.

4.3 stars across 390 reviews. Not influencer-staged. Just real.

Go early. 6-8am is peak chaos, peak freshness, and peak people-watching.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Vendors unpack live crabs at 6am. Piles of peppercorns the size of your head. This is Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc before the tour buses even wake up. Come hungry.

instagram.caption:
Locals don't post this market. You should.

Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc. 4.3★, 390 reviews, zero tourist menus. Go at 6am.

items.placeName: Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm - Lobster Cave seafood

facebook.caption:
7,610 reviews. 4.8 stars. And your meal still costs under $30.

Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm is the seafood spot in Phu Quoc that keeps delivering. Fresh lobster, grilled prawns, and whole fish dishes, at 1 Đường Bạch Đằng, right where locals and tourists agree on quality.

At $15-30 per person, this is the meal you'll talk about the whole trip.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
